login.subtitle: Sign in to your account to continue
login.forgotPasswordDesc: Password reset functionality will be available soon.
login.magicLink: Client or Sub? Sign in with magic link
login.errorInvalid: Email or password is incorrect. Please try again.
login.errorRequired: Both email and password are required.
login.errorServer: Unable to connect to the server. Please try again later.
login.errorGeneric: Please check your email and password and try again.
validation.emailInvalid: Please enter a valid email address
validation.passwordMinLength: Password must be at least 6 characters
requestLink.title: Sign in with magic link
requestLink.subtitle: Enter your email and we'll send you a link to sign in — no password needed.
requestLink.rateLimited: Too many requests. Please try again in a few minutes.
requestLink.checkEmailDesc: If an account exists for {{email}}, we've sent a sign-in link. Check your inbox and click the link to access your project.
requestLink.linkExpires: The link expires in 15 minutes. Check spam if you don't see it.
onboard.expiredDesc: This invitation link has expired, already been used, or is invalid. Please contact your administrator for a new invitation.
onboard.resetPasswordDesc: Enter a new password for your account
onboard.setupCompanyDesc: Complete your account setup to get started with Proesphere
onboard.passwordMinLength: Password must be at least 8 characters with uppercase, lowercase, and a digit
branding.title: Company Branding
branding.description: Customize how your company appears in client invitation emails. Emails are sent on behalf of your company — clients never see "Proesphere".
branding.logoHint: Recommended: PNG or SVG, max 200px wide.
branding.brandColorHint: Used for buttons and accents in client emails.
branding.updatedDesc: Your company branding has been saved.
